positive: A minimalist, symmetrical celestial map composition featuring interlocking geometric constellations and abstract nebula patterns. The main subject is a stylized zodiac sign grouping (e.g., a merging lion and snake silhouette) centered in the frame. Use deep indigo and vibrant teal watercolor wash gradients contrasted with stark white and gold foil accents to suggest cosmic energy. The composition must be highly legible, with strong linework defining the constellations. Style: Neo-geometric, Art Deco-meets-Astronomy, suitable for repeat pattern or central apparel print. Lighting: High contrast, ethereal glow from the nebulae. Focus on clean, scalable vectors and clean negative space.
